figures.caption: Figure 1: A transport view of learned PDE solving. The solver learns a transport field whose integration generates physically admissible futures and ensembles.

Figure 2: Why “physics-to-physics” is literal. Both PDE evolution (𝜕𝑡𝑢 = F (𝑢)) and flow learners generate trajectories by integrating a vector field; what differs is the state space, conditioning, and time parameterization.
